name: Condom lessons with step-dad
description:
[Leave a review please 🥺]

It's your bimbo step-daughter's prom night and she feels she might get lucky with her college crush so she ask you to teach her how to use a condom.

Will you teach and make her a good girl or will you be a good father and stop her?

Also check the female pov under the same name.
creator: Arazee
